LanguageData.AsteroidMiningSite.description:
A vacstone asteroid that was towed into orbit around the planet as part of a mining operation long ago. This asteroid has only been partially mined.
This location can be reached using transport pods, shuttles, or the Hellion.
LanguageData.GeneratedAsteroid.description:
A vacstone asteroid that was towed into orbit around the planet as part of a mining operation long ago. Most of the valuable resources have been depleted from this asteroid.
This location can be reached using transport pods, shuttles, or the Hellion.
LanguageData.Gravship.label: Hellion
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.description: The launch site of the Hellion.
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.label: Hellion launch
LanguageData.SpaceSettlement.description:
An orbital platform controlled by another human faction. They won't appreciate visitors.
These platforms have long-range automatic weapon systems capable of destroying incoming ships. They can only safely be approached by the Hellion if it is fitted with an ECM suite.
